Package dontlookback

Class LightSource

java.lang.Object
dontlookback.Objects
dontlookback.LightSource
All Implemented Interfaces:
Entities, Intangibles, Light
public class LightSource extends Objects implements Light
Light Source Implementation for Don't Look Back Represents various light sources that protect players from the grue: - Matches (temporary, consumable) - Candles (longer duration, placeable) - Torches (portable, medium duration) - Fireplace (permanent, stationary) - Flashlight (rechargeable, limited battery) Core to the game's light/darkness survival mechanic.
Version:
1.0
Author:
DLB Team

      public LightSource(LightSource.LightType lightType, float[] position, float orientation)

      position - Initial position [x, y, z]
      orientation - Initial orientation

  • Method Details

    • light

      public boolean light()
      Light/ignite this light source
      Returns:
      true if successfully lit, false if cannot be lit

      public void extinguish()
      Extinguish this light source

    • update

      public void update(float deltaTime)
      Update light source state (call every frame)
      Parameters:
      deltaTime - Time since last update in seconds

      public boolean isPositionProtected(float[] position)
      Check if a position is within the protection radius of this light
      Parameters:
      position - Position to check [x, y, z]
      Returns:
      true if position is protected from grue

Don't Look Back - Horror Survival Game Engine

Built with Java 17, LWJGL 3.3.4, JBox2D | GitHub Repository | Report Issues
